retrieved_result: Who Makes What Who Makes What By admin · 5/15/2006, 3:43 p.m. Good news: We're all apparently rolling in money . Massachusetts is the fifth-wealthiest state in America, according to the U. S. Census Bureau — up from sixth in 1990. And that's a good thing, too, considering the cost of living here is 25 percent high
Decision_Reason: The retrieved page discusses wealth and Massachusetts; it has no relation to IDEs or software development tools.
